commit_diary.description: Each commit must be a diary entry in the style of a storyteller.
commit_diary.stretching_policy: NO artificial stretching. If short, work on other files (docs, verify, index) first.

sidejoke_pool.description: First sentence must adapt a sidejoke from the pool seamlessly.

plot_documentation.description: Dialog text must be added to the persistent PLOT_LORE.md.

model_signature.description: Commit message must contain [MODEL:<name>] token identifying the LLM that created the commit.
model_signature.note: The regex is enforced in verify_commit_msg.js — this JSON documents the spec only.

cross_references.description: Must reference at least one persistent plot variable or past commit hash from the registry.
